page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores utilizing the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource allocation of 2.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates strong multi-core processing capabilities, as evidenced by its high multi-core stress-ng and PassMark CPU scores. Memory read bandwidth is also a notable strength, particularly for small cached blocks and large uncached blocks. However, memory write bandwidth and single-core operations, such as single-threaded gzip compression, perform within average ranges. The instance also exhibits weaker performance in low-parameter LLM text generation tasks.

Given its high core density and strong multi-threaded decompression and database operation benchmarks, the ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is highly cost-efficient for compute-intensive workloads that do not require local SSD storage or GPU acceleration. It is well-suited for high-throughput database operations, Redis caching layers, multi-threaded data processing, and parallelized compilation tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY cores running at 3.1 GHz and 128.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and GPU accelerators, it provides 20 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth. The instance delivers strong multi-core CPU performance and high memory read bandwidth, alongside robust database and Redis SET operation throughput. Single-core performance and memory write speeds remain average, while text generation for small LLMs is a relative bottleneck. This hardware profile makes the instance highly efficient for parallelized, compute-heavy workloads, including database operations, multi-threaded decompression, and caching systems.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge is a compute-optimized server with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc6.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 128 GB RAM, optimized for high-throughput multi-core workloads.
tagline: A high-core-density, compute-optimized platform designed for demanding multi-threaded processing, database operations, and high-speed memory read workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 3.1 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU
Strong multi-core CPU and memory read bandwidth benchmark results
Optimized for database operations, Redis caching, and multi-threaded decompression
